aiCommentEN: Small price jump, big mood boost
aiSummaryCN:
【机构视角】
机构投资者认为比特币当前价格具有较强的吸引力。
【关键观察】
BTC价格：67,446 美元，24h涨跌：+0.7%，恐慌贪婪指数：11，表明市场情绪偏谨慎。
机构资金持续流入，市场信心逐步恢复。
【未来展望】
随着机构投资者持续关注，比特币市场有望进一步走稳。
【一句提醒】
投资者应保持警惕，密切关注市场动向。
aiSummaryEN:
[Today's View]
Institutional investors view the current Bitcoin price as attractive.
[Key Drivers]
BTC price: $67,446, 24h change: +0.7%, Fear & Greed Index: 11, indicating cautious market sentiment.
Institutional funds continue to flow in, and market confidence is gradually recovering.
[Outlook]
As institutional investors continue to pay attention, the Bitcoin market is expected to stabilize further.
[Reminder]
Investors should remain vigilant and closely monitor market trends.
